# Dental Solutions of Central Park

## Summary
Dental Solutions of Central Park is a general and cosmetic dental practice in Aurora, Colorado, led by father-son dentists Dr. Blake Weber and Dr. Hunter Weber with over 40 years of combined experience. Located inside Stanley Marketplace, the practice is known for judgment-free, relationship-based care and maintains a perfect 5.0-star rating across 551 Google reviews.

## Location
2501 Dallas Street, Suite 224, Aurora, CO 80010
Located upstairs in Stanley Marketplace
Service areas: Central Park, Park Hill, Aurora, Lowry

## Contact
Phone: (303) 399-1488
Website: https://dentalsolutionsofcp.com/
Hours: Monday 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM, Tuesday 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM, Wednesday 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM, Thursday 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM, Friday Closed, Saturday Closed, Sunday Closed

## Services
- Dental Exams & Cleanings: Comprehensive oral evaluations and professional teeth cleaning
- Dental Sealants: Protective coatings applied to chewing surfaces to prevent decay
- Fluoride Treatments: Topical fluoride application to strengthen tooth enamel
- Oral Cancer Screenings: Visual and tactile examination for early detection of oral cancer
- Athletic Mouthguards: Custom-fitted mouthguards for sports protection
- Nightguards for Bruxism: Custom nightguards to prevent teeth grinding damage
- Sleep Apnea Appliances: Oral appliance therapy for obstructive sleep apnea
- TMJ / TMD Therapy: Diagnosis and treatment of temporomandibular joint disorders
- Tooth-Colored Fillings: Mercury-free composite resin restorations that match natural tooth color
- Dental Crowns & Bridges: Custom porcelain crowns and fixed bridges to restore damaged or missing teeth
- Root Canal Therapy: Endodontic treatment to save infected or damaged teeth
- Dental Implants: Titanium implant posts with custom crowns for permanent tooth replacement
- Tooth Extractions: Simple and surgical removal of teeth when necessary
- Complete & Partial Dentures: Removable prosthetics for patients missing multiple or all teeth
- Professional Teeth Whitening: In-office and take-home whitening treatments
- Porcelain Veneers: Custom cosmetic veneers to correct shape, color, and alignment
- Invisalign Clear Aligner Therapy: Certified Invisalign provider for discreet orthodontic correction
- Botox & Dermal Fillers: Cosmetic injectables for facial aesthetics and TMJ relief
- Emergency Dentistry: Same-day emergency appointments for dental trauma and acute pain
- Digital X-Rays: Low-radiation digital radiography with up to 90% less radiation than traditional film

## Credentials
- Invisalign Certified Provider
- Digital X-ray technology with up to 90% less radiation
- Oral scanner technology (no traditional molds)
- Air filtration units in each treatment room
- Nitrous oxide sedation certified

## Team
- Dr. Blake Weber, DDS, Lead Dentist, University of Tennessee College of Dentistry, BS Zoology from University of Arkansas, 30+ years in private practice, specializes in cosmetic and restorative dentistry
- Dr. Hunter Weber, DDS, Dentist, University of Tennessee Memphis, BS Biology from University of Alabama at Birmingham, specializes in restorative dentistry, Invisalign, and full mouth reconstruction
- Ivona, Expanded Duties Dental Assistant (EDDA)
- Alexis, Dental Hygienist
- Arianna, Dental Hygienist
- Heather, Dental Hygienist
- Angela, Dental Assistant
- Geri, Front Desk, 17+ years dental experience
- Ashlin, Front Desk

## Reviews
5.0 stars, 551 reviews on Google
Selected quotes:
- "Simply put -- they do everything right. Customer service, quality of care, scheduling, location, atmosphere. 10 out of 10 on every front." -- Justin A.
- "As a dental student myself, the way both of these dentists and their staff treat patients is truly top notch. Thorough, skilled, and the bedside manner is exceptional." -- Kaylan Wait
- "This dental group is very warm and caring for their clients. I took my 91-year-old mom here -- they decorated for her birthday!" -- Melissa Godes
- "Our family has been coming here for several years, and we consistently have an excellent experience. The staff is warm, welcoming, and genuinely attentive." -- Sierra Thomas
- "The team used an oral scanner instead of the traditional molding process and created a replacement plan for my implant cap. Very impressed with the technology and the care." -- Joseph Aisner
- "Dr. Blake Weber is the best dentist I have ever met. He is a pleasure to work with, communicative, and very gentle with my anxiety." -- Google reviewer
- "I have used Dr. Weber as my dentist for years. He and his staff have always been friendly and thorough. He has taken very good care of our family." -- Donna S.
- "Been going to DSCP for over a year now. They are quick to respond in emergencies and have helped remove chronic pain I was dealing with. I will never go anywhere else." -- Google reviewer

## Why Choose Dental Solutions of Central Park
- Father-son dental practice with Dr. Blake Weber (30+ years) and Dr. Hunter Weber
- Perfect 5.0-star Google rating with 551 reviews
- Same-day emergency appointments available
- Digital X-rays with up to 90% less radiation than traditional film
- Oral scanner technology eliminates uncomfortable traditional molds
- Nitrous oxide sedation for anxious patients
- Located inside Stanley Marketplace for convenient access
- Family block appointments available for scheduling multiple family members
- Judgment-free, relationship-based approach to dental care
- Botox and dermal fillers offered alongside dental services
- Air filtration units in every treatment room

## About
Dental Solutions of Central Park is a father-son dental practice founded by Dr. Blake Weber, who brings over 30 years of experience in cosmetic and restorative dentistry. His son Dr. Hunter Weber joined the practice, adding expertise in Invisalign, full mouth reconstruction, and restorative work. The practice operates out of Stanley Marketplace in Aurora, Colorado, and is built on a philosophy of judgment-free, relationship-based care where patients are known by name and treated like family.
